zh.lifeSummary: 當Ughtred of Singleton於大約1125年出生在英國藍卡爾辛格登時，他的父親Hucca de Singleton32歲，母親Mrs Hucca de Singleton22歲。他至少有10個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1185年9月29日之前在英國藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ughtred of Singleton于大约1125年出生在英国藍卡爾辛格登时，他的父亲Hucca de Singleton32岁，母亲Mrs Hucca de Singleton22岁。他至少有10个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1185年9月29日之前在英国藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Singleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Singleton (Lancashire), probably from Old English scingol ‘shingle, wooden roof tile’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Bearers of this surname are said to be descended from Ughtred de Sinleton, holder of lands in Amounderness wapentake (Lancashire) c. 1160–90. This name was first recorded in Ireland in 1308 and firmly established in Louth and Monaghan during the 17th century.
habitational name from Singleton (Sussex), probably from Old English sængel, sengel ‘bundle, tuft’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Shingleton
meanings: English: late medieval variant of   Singleton  .

nameMeanings.name: Ughtred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the rare Old English personal name Uhtrǣd, composed of the elements uht ‘dawn’ + rǣd ‘counsel, advice’. This is a very uncommon given name in the English-speaking world, but remains in use in the Shuttleworth family.

en.lifeSummary: When Ughtred of Singleton was born about 1125, in Singleton, Lancashire, England, his father, Hucca de Singleton, was 32 and his mother, Mrs Hucca de Singleton, was 22. He had at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 29 September 1185, in Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ughtred of Singleton est né environ 1125, à Singleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Hucca de Singleton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs Hucca de Singleton, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 29 septembre 1185, à Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ughtred of Singleton um 1125 in Singleton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hucca de Singleton 32 und seine Mutter Mrs Hucca de Singleton 22. Er hatte mindestens 10 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 29. September 1185 in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ughtred of Singleton è nato il circa 1125 nel Singleton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Hucca de Singleton, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Hucca de Singleton, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 10 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 29 settembre 1185, nel Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ughtred of Singletonが約1125年にイギリスランカシュアイアシングレトンで生まれた時，父Hucca de Singletonは32歳，母Mrs Hucca de Singletonは22歳であった。彼は少なくとも10人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1185年9月29日以前にイギリスランカシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ughtred of Singleton(이)가 대략 1125년 영국 랭카실르 징글레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hucca de Singleton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Hucca de Singleton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1185년 9월 29일 이전 영국 랭카실르에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1125–before 29 September 1185: ойролцоогоор 1125 он–1185 оны Есдүгээр сарын 29–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ughtred of Singleton nasceu aproximadamente 1125, em Singleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hucca de Singleton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Hucca de Singleton, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 10 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 29 de setembro de 1185, em Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ughtred of Singleton родился около 1125 г. в местности синглетон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hucca de Singleton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Hucca de Singleton, 22. У него было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 29 сентябрь 1185 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ughtred of Singleton nació aproximadamente 1125, en Singleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hucca de Singleton, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mrs Hucca de Singleton, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 10 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 29 de septiembre de 1185, en Lancashire, Inglaterra.
